meaning: adj.会意的,心照不宣的,聪颖的,精明的,<贬>世故的,狡猾的
examples: Ron gave her a knowing smile.
He gave her a knowing wink.
He did it on purpose, knowing it would annoy her.
You can sleep soundly knowing that a parcel of your net worth is safe and sound.
Knowing where, when, and how to move will require rigorous market analysis with accurate data.
